subject: Update parent pom version to 2.4.6
commit_message:
Update parent pom version to 2.4.6

Update parent pom version to 2.4.6 to pick up dmaap client version
fix

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3796
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>
Change-Id: I454ce31d105a7b304f765396f2d7964d587ee480

Fix: upgrade to robotframework py3 script

Issue-ID: CIMAN-33
Signed-off-by: Kevin Sandi <ksandi@contractor.linuxfoundation.org>
Change-Id: I409cc94cb5c9a8981d0dc3562bc9e69cfd3784db
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>
